description.en: Second long-tail move: fans submit set designs; community votes; designs reaching the threshold are reviewed by LEGO and may go to commercial production with revenue share. Operating since 2008 (CUUSOO Japan), rebranded Lego Ideas in 2014. 60+ commercially released sets to date.
description.zh: 乐高的第二次长尾动作:粉丝提交套装设计,社区投票,达到阈值后由乐高评审,被选中的设计正式量产并和原作者分成。2008 年从日本 CUUSOO 起步,2014 年改名为 LEGO Ideas。截至 2025 年已有 60+ 套基于粉丝设计的商业化套装。
